query:
INSERT INTO
    fiskeridir_vessels (
    fiskeridir_vessel_id,norwegian_municipality_id,call_sign,name,registration_id,length,width,engine_power,imo_number,deprecated,register_landing_reset,owners,fiskeridir_vessel_source_id
   )
SELECT
    *
FROM
    UNNEST(
        $1::BIGINT[],$2::INT[],$3::TEXT[],$4::TEXT[],$5::TEXT[],$6::DOUBLE PRECISION[],$7::DOUBLE PRECISION[],$8::INT[],$9::BIGINT[],$10::BOOLEAN[],$11::BOOLEAN[],$12::JSON[],$13::INT[]
    )
        ON CONFLICT (fiskeridir_vessel_id) DO UPDATE SET norwegian_municipality_id = EXCLUDED.norwegian_municipality_id,call_sign = EXCLUDED.call_sign,name = EXCLUDED.name,registration_id = EXCLUDED.registration_id,length = EXCLUDED.length,width = EXCLUDED.width,engine_power = EXCLUDED.engine_power,imo_number = EXCLUDED.imo_number,deprecated = EXCLUDED.deprecated,register_landing_reset = EXCLUDED.register_landing_reset,owners = EXCLUDED.owners,fiskeridir_vessel_source_id = EXCLUDED.fiskeridir_vessel_source_id
